member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.IPlugin
member.summary: Describes the bare minimum functionality of a WTNS plugin.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.IPlugin.OnLoad
member.summary: Called when the plugin is initially loaded.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.IPlugin.OnUnload
member.summary: Called when the plugin is unloaded. Not called in the case of a Reload.

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Plugin
member.summary: Provides an entry point to supply WTNS with custom code and functionality. It's inherited functions should perform an action that is reflective of it's name. Implements the IPlugin interface, while it's code is not exposed it can be found in the documentation under

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Plugin.Name
member.summary: The name of the plugin, must be at least 3 characters long.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Plugin.Description
member.summary: The description of the plugin, must be at least 3 characters long.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Plugin.OnLoad
member.summary: Called when loading the plugin assembly.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Plugin.OnUnload
member.summary: Called when the plugin assembly is unloaded.

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Repl
member.summary:
REPL (Read, Evaluate, Print, and Loop) service for the WTNS CLI. Allows for an interactive experience, rather than the default single execution style. (-e, --execute)
Follows singleton pattern to avoid multiple instantiations and other conflicts.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Repl.Instance
member.summary: The REPL instance, initialized only whe called (lazy).

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Repl.Replconfiguration
member.summary: The to use fo the REPL. If a custom configuration object has not been supplied, the defaults are used.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Repl.ReplStructuredOutput
member.summary: The output structure to use. Allows for the manipulation and ordering/reording of the output segments.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Repl.#ctor(Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput)
member.summary: Constructor for the REPL.
member.param: The output structure to use when outputting data.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Repl.Listen
member.summary: Begins listening for the submission of a string of text (command) from the user.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Repl.Log(System.String,System.Boolean,Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode)
member.summary: Provides a more convienient way to access .
member.param: Additional text to append to the output string.
Whether or not to capture input.
The to use. (Color and format)

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Cli.Repl.Log(System.String[],System.Boolean,Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode)
member.summary: Provides a more convienient way to access
member.param: Additional text to append to the output string.
Whether or not to capture input.
The to use. (Color and format)

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry
member.summary: A registry which exposes commands to the CLI. All commands must be registered before they can be discovered by the CLI. For help creating commands please see . Follows singleton design pattern with support for lazy initialization.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.Instance
member.summary: Represents the singleton instance of the class.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.RegisterCommand(System.CommandLine.Command)
member.summary: Registers a with the registry.
member.param: The to register.
member.returns: True of the was registered, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.RegisterCommand(System.CommandLine.RootCommand)
member.summary: Registers a with the registry.
member.param: The to register.
member.returns: True of the was registered, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.RemoveCommand(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a from the registry.
member.param: The name of the to remove.
member.returns: True if the was found and removed, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.GetCommand(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a from the registry.
member.param: The name of the to get.
member.returns: The if found, null otherwise.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.GetRegisteredCommands
member.summary: Returns a dictionary of all registered s.
member.returns: A dictionary of all available commands.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.ExecuteCommand(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Executes a from the registry.
member.param: The to parse and execute.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.ExecuteCommand(System.String[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Executes a from the registry.
member.param: The array of strings that represents the commands.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.ClearHistory
member.summary: Clears the history of executed s.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.SaveHistory(System.String)
member.summary: Saves the history of executed s to a file.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.LoadHistory(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the history of executed s from a file.
member.param: The path to load data from - Will be moved ot Configuration later.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Commands.CommandRegistry.ReplayHistory
member.summary: Replays the history of executed s.

member.summary: User command which exposes the built

member.summary: Contructor for .

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration
member.summary: Contains all application preferences.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.Name
member.summary: The name of the Configuration.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.Pepper
member.summary: The secret phrase used for certain functions such as hashing.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.ForegroundColor
member.summary: The color of the console foreground.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.BackgroundColor
member.summary: The color of the console background.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.DebugColor
member.summary: The color of DEBUG output.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.InfoColor
member.summary: The color of INFO output.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.WarningColor
member.summary: The color of WARNING output.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.ErrorColor
member.summary: The color of ERROR output.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.AiColor
member.summary: The color of AI output.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.DebugIcon
member.summary: The icon to use for DEBUG output. (typically an emoji or single character)

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.InfoIcon
member.summary: The icon to use for INFO output. (typically an emoji or single character)

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.WarningIcon
member.summary: The icon to use for WARNING output. (typically an emoji or single character)

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.ErrorIcon
member.summary: The icon to use for ERROR output. (typically an emoji or single character)

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.AiIcon
member.summary: The icon to use for AI output. (Typically an emoji or single character)

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.OpenAiApiKey
member.summary: The OpenAI API key that will be used for any service that requires one.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration.OutputFormat
member.summary: Defines the structure (format) to use when outputting data. Allows for a custom appearance.

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry
member.summary: A registry for managing Configurations.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.instance
member.summary: Support for lazy initialization of the ConfigurationRegistry.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.configurations
member.summary: Dictionary of configurations. The key is the configuration name and the value is the Configuration object.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.Instance
member.summary: Gets the singleton instance of the ConfigurationRegistry.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.CurrentConfiguration
member.summary: The current configuration being used.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.DefaultConfiguration
member.summary: The default configuration for templating or fallback.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.#ctor
member.summary: Contructor for ConfigurationRegistry.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.AddConfiguration(System.String,Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration)
member.summary: Adds a Configuration to the registry.
member.param: The name of the Configuration.
The Configuration object.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.RemoveConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a Configuration from the registry.
member.param: The name of the Configuration to remove.
member.returns: True if the Configuration was removed successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.GetConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a Configuration from the registry.
member.param: The name of the Configuration to retrieve.
member.returns: The Configuration object if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.GetAllConfigurations
member.summary: Gets all Configurations from the registry.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of all Configurations.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.ApplyConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Applies a Configuration by name.
member.param: The name of the Configuration to apply.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.ApplyConfiguration(Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration)
member.summary: Applies a Configuration object.
member.param: The Configuration object to apply.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConfigurationRegistry.SaveConfiguration(Wtns.Me.Lib.Configuration,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Physically saves a Configuration object to disk.
member.param: The configuration to save.
Whether or not to use Binary Serialization

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConsoleLogger
member.summary: Data-To-Console implementation of the ILogger interface.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.ConsoleLogger.Log(System.String)
member.summary: Logs to the console using the color formatting syntax.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.CpuInfo.Name
member.summary: The name used to identify the CPU.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.CpuInfo.Id
member.summary: The Id (also known as hardware Id) assigned to the processor. Not all configurations or cpus will report this value. These are considered 'Unassigned' Id's and should be handled gracefully.

summary.para: The CPU `Caption` string typically follows the standard structure:

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.HashingService.CreateHash(System.String,System.Int32)

summary.para: Hashes string using BCrypt with a custom cost factor.
Pepper will be set to the value of the environment variable `WTNS_PEPPER`

member.param: The password to hash.
The cost factor for BCrypt. Higher values increase computation time.
member.returns: The hashed password.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.HashingService.VerifyHash(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a password against a hashed password.
member.param: The password to verify.
The hashed password to compare against.
member.returns: True if the password matches the hashed password, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.IProfiler.GetMotherboardInfo
member.summary: Collects information relating to motherboard installed on the host machine.
member.returns: A structure containing motherboard related information.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.IProfiler.GetProcessorInfo
member.summary: Collects information relating to CPU(s) installed on the host machine.
member.returns: A structure containing CPU related information.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.IProfiler.GetGpuInfo
member.summary: Collects information relating to GPU(s) installed on the host machine.
member.returns: A structure containing GPU related information.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.IProfiler.GetRamInfo
member.summary: Collects information relating to RAM installed on the host machine.
member.returns: A structure containing RAM related information.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.IProfiler.GetStorageInfo
member.summary: Collects information relating to storage devices installed on the host machine.
member.returns: A structure containing storage related information.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.IProfiler.GetNetInfo
member.summary: Collects information relating to network devices installed on the host machine.
member.returns: A structure containing storage related information.

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.AuthorizationProvider
member.summary: Provides access to services which require authorization. (i.e. Logging in, Creating a user, Logging out)

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.AuthorizationProvider.WtnsContext
member.summary: The object to use within Authorization Provider

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.AuthorizationProvider.Login(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a object if the username and password are valid, otherwise returns null.
member.param: The name of the user.
The password of the user.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.AuthorizationProvider.Logout
member.summary: Sets the session equal to null, requiring the user to reauthenticate to access a new session.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.AuthorizationProvider.CreateUser(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new user with the given username, password, and optional displayname and bio. Returns the new user if successful, otherwise returns null.
member.param: The desired username.
The desired password.
The desired displayname
The desired Bio
member.returns: The user if successful, otherwise null.

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle
member.summary:
Uses an existing, locally running, IPFS daemon to complete a given request. Acts as a wrapper for the namespaces with additional abstraction and utility functions.
Note: CID, or Content Identifier, is a uniue label that points to content on IPFS.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle._ipfsClient
member.summary: Underlying IpfsClient Object, hidden to avoid redundency in code and code completions.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.DefaultDownloadDirectory
member.summary: The default directory to store files from IPFS.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.GetPeerId
member.summary: Gets the Peer ID of the local IPFS daemon. If the Peer ID cannot be acquired (i.e. IPFS daemon is offline) or is otherwise equal to null, this function will return null. Use null checking, or a try catch block to avoid crashes where PeerId is equal to null.
member.returns: The peer ID, if one is found, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.SetConnectionUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Reinitializes the underlying object using a new connection string. i.e. http://127.0.0.1:5001
member.param: The connection URL to use (i.e. 'http://127.0.0.1:5001')

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.AddText(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a string of text to IPFS.
member.returns: The cid of the uploaded text.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.AddFile(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a file to IPFS.
member.param: The path to the file to be added.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.AddDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a directory to IPFS.
member.param: The path to the directory to add.
member.returns: The cid of the added Directory.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.GetFile(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Downloads a file from IPFS as an archive (.tar) file.
member.param: The CID to use when retrieving the file.
What the emitted file will be named.
The directory to save the file to.
member.returns: True if the operation completed successfully, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.GetText(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets Text data from IPFS.
member.param: The CID to use when retrieving the text.
The name of the file - defaults to a timestamp.
The directory to save the file to.
member.returns: The text read that was read from the file, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.Pin(System.String)
member.summary: Pins a given CID to the local IPFS daemon.
member.param: The CID of the file/directory you wish to pin.
member.returns: The CID of the pinned content, if it was pinned. Otherwise, returns null.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.GetAllPins
member.summary: Gets and returns a list of all CIDs pinned to the local IPFS daemon.
member.returns: A List of CIDs pinned to the local IPFS daemon.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.Unpin(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the pinned content for a given CID.
member.param: The CID to unpin.
member.returns: The CID of content, if it was unpinned. Otherwise, returns null.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.IpfsHandle.IsOnline
member.summary: Checks whether or not a local IPFS daemon is currently online/reachable by attempting to acquire the Peer ID.
member.returns: True if the peer ID was found, false if the peer ID could not be determined.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.Session.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Session contructor
member.param: The amount of time in milliseconds to give the session before expiring.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.Session.IsActive(Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.Session)
member.summary: Determines whether the Session is still active or has expired.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.Session.Extend(Wtns.Me.Lib.Net.Session,System.Int32)
member.summary: Extends the time until session expiry.
member.param: The session to extend.
The amount of time in milliseconds to extend it by.

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.FileLogger
member.summary: Data-To-File implementation of the ILogger interface.

member.name: P:Wtns.Me.Lib.FileLogger.OutputDirectory
member.summary: The directory to output the log files to.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.FileLogger.Log(System.String)
member.summary: Logs the message to a file.
member.param: The message to log.

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.ProfilerFactory
member.summary: Provides access to a factory method to create a profiler based on the current operating system.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.ProfilerFactory.CreateProfiler

summary.para: Creates and returns a instance based on the current operating system.

member.returns: The correct based on the current operating system.

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput
member.summary: Represents a structured output with sections that can be added, removed, and reordered. By default the output has a single section called "Prefix". The section order can be modified to change the order of the sections.

member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode
member.summary: The output modes available to use within

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode.DEBUG
member.summary: DEBUG prints a message exclusively to the debugger.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode.INFO
member.summary: INFO prints an info message.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode.WARNING
member.summary: WARNING prints a warning message.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode.ERROR
member.summary: ERROR prints an error message.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode.AI
member.summary: AI prints AI chat-completions.

member.name: F:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode.DEBUG_MIRRORED
member.summary: Prints to the attached debugger and to the console.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.AddSection(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new section with the specified name and content. If a section with the same name exists, updates its content.
member.param: The name of the section to add or update.
The content of the section.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.RemoveSection(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the section with the specified name.
member.param: The name of the section to remove.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.SetSectionContent(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the content of the section with the specified name. If the section does not exist, does nothing.
member.param: The name of the section to update.
The new content for the section.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.ReorderSection(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reorders the section with the specified name to the new index in the output. If the section does not exist or the index is out of range, does nothing.
member.param: The name of the section to reorder.
The new index for the section.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.DisplayOutputString(System.String,System.Boolean,Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode)
member.summary: Displays the structured output string. The sections are concatenated in the order specified by .
member.param: Additional text to append to the output string.
Whether or not to capture input.
The to use. (Color and format)
member.returns: The captured input if is true, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.DisplayOutputString(System.String[],System.Boolean,Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode)
member.summary: Displays the structured output string. The sections are concatenated in the order specified by .
member.param: Additional text to append to the output string.
Whether or not to capture input.
The to use. (Color and format)
member.returns: The captured input if is true, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.GetColorForMode(Wtns.Me.Lib.StructuredOutput.OutputMode)
member.summary: Gets the console color for the given output mode.

summary.para: Note: This class uses Windows specific code and supports only the operating system versions that are directly supported by the framework it depends on. (in most cases, .NET)

item.description: Legacy hardware and operating systems may not be supported.
Obscure hardware and operating systems may not be supported.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetWmiObject``1(System.String,System.Func{System.Object,``0})
member.summary: Retrieves a property of the processor using WMI as a List where each element in the List corresponds to an individual piece of hardware.
member.typeparam: The type of the property to retrieve.
member.param: The name of the property to retrieve.
A function to convert the retrieved object to the desired type.
member.returns: A list of values of the specified property, or null if an error occurs or the platform is not Windows.

members.member: Gets the address width of all processors in the system. s A list of ushort values representing the address widths of all processors, or null if an error occurs or the platform is not Windows.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorArchitecture
member.summary: Gets the architecture of all processors in the system.
member.returns: A list of ushort values representing the architectures of all processors, or null if an error occurs or the platform is not Windows.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorArchitectureFriendlyValue
member.summary: Gets the friendly names of the processor architectures for each processor.
member.returns: The list of friendly names of the processor architectures for each processor, or null if the method is not supported on the current platform or if no architectures are available.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.MapProcessorArchitectureToFriendlyValue(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Maps the

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorAvailability
member.summary: Retrieves the availability of the processor. Availability indicates the availability and status of the processor.
member.returns: A list of ushort values representing the availability of each processor.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.MapProcessorAvailabilityToFriendlyValue(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Maps the availability code to its corresponding friendly name.
member.param: The ushort value representing the availability code.
member.returns: The friendly name of the availability, or null if the value is not recognized.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorCharacteristics
member.summary: Retrieves the characteristics of each processor.
member.returns: A list of uint32 values representing the characteristics of each processor, or null if the operation fails.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorCharacteristicsFriendlyValue
member.summary: Retrieves the characteristics of each processor and maps them to their corresponding friendly names.
member.returns: A list of lists of strings representing the friendly names of the characteristics for each processor.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.MapProcessorCharacteristicsToFriendlyValue(System.UInt32)

summary.para: Maps the binary representation of processor characteristics to their corresponding friendly names.
Use as Microsofts documentation does not contain the mappings for these values. />

member.param: The uint32 representation of processor characteristics.
member.returns: A list of strings representing the friendly names of the characteristics.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorConfigManagerErrorCode
member.summary: Retrieves the ConfigManagerErrorCode for each processor.
member.remarks: The ConfigManagerErrorCode represents the error code reported by the Configuration Manager. This method queries WMI to fetch the ConfigManagerErrorCode for every processor present in the system.
member.returns: A list of uint values representing the ConfigManagerErrorCode of each processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorConfigManagerErrorCodeFriendlyValue
member.summary: Retrieves friendly names corresponding to the ConfigManagerErrorCode of each processor.
member.remarks: Utilizes the method to fetch raw ConfigManagerErrorCode values and then maps them to user-friendly descriptions via .
member.returns: A list of lists of strings representing the friendly names for the ConfigManagerErrorCode of each processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.MapProcessorConfigManagerErrorCodeToFriendlyValue(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Maps a ConfigManagerErrorCode to its corresponding friendly name(s).
member.param: The uint value representing the ConfigManagerErrorCode.
member.returns: A list of strings representing the friendly name(s) of the ConfigManagerErrorCode.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorConfigManagerUserConfig
member.summary: Retrieves the ConfigManagerUserConfig value for each processor.
member.returns: A list of boolean values representing whether the device is using a user-defined configuration for each processor, or null if the operation fails. True indicates a user-defined configuration is in use.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorCpuStatus
member.summary: Retrieves the raw CpuStatus values for each processor on the system.
member.remarks: This method queries WMI to fetch the CpuStatus property for each processor, indicating its operational state.
member.returns: A list containing the CpuStatus for each processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorCpuStatusFriendlyValue
member.summary: Retrieves friendly names corresponding to the CpuStatus code of each processor.
member.remarks: Utilizes the method to fetch raw CpuStatus values and then maps them to user-friendly descriptions via .
member.returns: A list of friendly names representing each processor's CpuStatus, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.MapProcessorCpuStatusToFriendlyValue(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Maps a numeric CpuStatus code to a human-readable description or friendly name.
member.param: A ushort value representing the CpuStatus code.
member.returns: The friendly name describing the CpuStatus. Returns null if the value is not recognized.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorCreationClassName
member.summary: Retrieves the CreationClassName for each processor on the system.
member.remarks: CreationClassName provides the name of the first concrete class in the inheritance chain used to create an instance. This method fetches the CreationClassName for each processor to uniquely identify the processor class type within WMI.
member.returns: A list of strings each representing the CreationClassName of a processor, or null if the operation fails.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorCurrentClockSpeed
member.summary: Retrieves the CurrentClockSpeed for each processor.
member.remarks: The CurrentClockSpeed represents the current speed of the processor in MHz, as reported by the System Management BIOS (SMBIOS) Processor Information structure. This method queries WMI to fetch the CurrentClockSpeed for every processor present in the system.
member.returns: A list of uint values representing the CurrentClockSpeed of each processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorCurrentVoltage
member.summary: Retrieves the CurrentVoltage for each processor, expressed in tenth-volts.
member.remarks: The CurrentVoltage represents the raw voltage of the processor in tenth-volts, directly fetched from WMI. If the eighth bit is set, bits 0-6 contain the voltage multiplied by 10.
member.returns: A list of ushort values representing the CurrentVoltage of each processor in tenth-volts, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorCurrentVoltageFriendlyValue
member.summary: Retrieves and converts the CurrentVoltage for each processor to a more user-friendly decimal format (volts).
member.remarks: This function takes the raw voltage values in tenth-volts, processes them, and presents them in volts. It considers the SMBIOS documentation for accurate interpretation, especially regarding the eighth bit logic.
member.returns: A list of decimal values representing each processor's voltage in volts, or null if unable to process.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorDataWidth
member.summary: Retrieves the DataWidth for each processor.
member.remarks: The DataWidth indicates the architecture width of the processor in bits. For a 32-bit processor, the value is 32, and for a 64-bit processor, it is 64. This method queries WMI to fetch the DataWidth for every processor present in the system.
member.returns: A list of ushort values representing the DataWidth of each processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorDescription
member.summary: Retrieves the Description for each processor.
member.remarks: The Description property provides a textual description of the processor. This method queries WMI to fetch the Description for every processor present in the system.
member.returns: A list of strings each representing the Description of a processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorDeviceID
member.summary: Retrieves the DeviceID for each processor.
member.remarks: The DeviceID property provides a unique identifier for each processor on the system. This method queries WMI to fetch the DeviceID for every processor present in the system, facilitating identification and cataloging of processor units. This property is crucial for distinguishing among multiple processors within a single system.
member.returns: A list of strings each representing the DeviceID of a processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorErrorCleared
member.summary: Retrieves the ErrorCleared status for each processor.
member.remarks: The ErrorCleared property indicates whether the processor's last reported error (noted in LastErrorCode) has been resolved. A True value signifies that no errors are currently flagged for the processor. This method queries WMI to fetch the ErrorCleared status for every processor present in the system.
member.returns: A list of boolean values each representing the ErrorCleared status of a processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorErrorDescription
member.summary: Retrieves the ErrorDescription for each processor.
member.returns: A list of strings each representing the ErrorDescription of a processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorExtClock
member.summary: Retrieves the ExtClock (External Clock Frequency) for each processor, expressed in MHz.
member.remarks: The ExtClock property indicates the external clock frequency of the processor in megahertz (MHz). If the frequency is unknown or not applicable, the property is set to NULL. This method queries the WMI for the ExtClock property for every processor in the system, based on SMBIOS Processor Information.
member.returns: A list of uint values representing the ExtClock of each processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorFamily
member.summary: Retrieves the processor family identifier for each processor.
member.returns: A list of ushort values representing the processor family identifier of each processor, or null if the information is unable to be retrieved.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorFamilyFriendlyValue
member.summary: Converts a list of processor family identifiers into a list of corresponding friendly names.
member.returns: A list of friendly names corresponding to the processor family identifiers, or null if the input list is empty or null.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.MapProcessorFamilyToFriendlyName(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Maps a single processor family identifier to its friendly name.
member.param: The family identifier of the processor.
member.returns: The friendly name corresponding to the processor family identifier, or null if there is no defined mapping.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorInstallDate
member.summary: Retrieves the InstallDate for each processor.
member.returns: A list of DateTime values representing the InstallDate of each processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorL2CacheSize
member.summary: Retrieves the L2CacheSize for each processor in kilobytes (KiB).
member.returns: A list of uint values representing the L2CacheSize in kilobytes (KiB) of each processor, or null if unable to retrieve.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorL2CacheSpeed
member.summary: Retrieves the clock speed of the Level 2 processor cache in megahertz (MHz).
member.returns: A list of uint values representing the clock speed of the Level 2 processor cache in megahertz (MHz), or null if unable to retrieve the information.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorL3CacheSize
member.summary: Retrieves the size of the Level 3 processor cache in kilobytes (KiB).
member.returns: A list of uint values representing the size of the Level 3 processor cache in kilobytes (KiB), or null if unable to retrieve the information.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorL3CacheSpeed
member.summary: Retrieves the clock speed of the Level 3 processor cache in megahertz (MHz).
member.returns: A list of uint values representing the clock speed of the Level 3 processor cache in megahertz (MHz), or null if unable to retrieve the information.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorLastErrorCode
member.summary: Retrieves the last error code reported by the logical device.
member.returns: The last error code reported by the logical device as a uint value, or null if unable to retrieve the information.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorLevel
member.summary: Retrieves the definition of the processor type.
member.returns: A list of ushort values representing the processor type levels, or null if an error occurs or the platform is not Windows.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorLoadPercentage
member.summary: Retrieves the load capacity of each processor, averaged to the last second.
member.returns: A list of ushort values representing the load percentages of each processor, or null if an error occurs or the platform is not Windows.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorManufacturer
member.summary: Retrieves the name of the processor manufacturer.
member.returns: A list of strings representing the processor manufacturers, or null if an error occurs or the platform is not Windows.

member.name: M:Wtns.Me.Lib.WindowsProfiler.GetProcessorMaxClockSpeed
member.summary: Retrieves the maximum speed of the processor in megahertz (MHz).
member.returns: A list of uint values representing the maximum speeds of the processors in megahertz (MHz), or null if an error occurs or the platform is not Windows.

member.name: T:UserRegistry
member.summary: A thread-safe registry of users, keyed by their Id. Allows for a centralized management of users.

member.name: P:UserRegistry.Instance
member.summary: The thread-safe
